body_type: State Revenue Department - Bingo Section
body_name: Arizona Department of Revenue - Bingo Section
verticals_covered: Charitable/recreational bingo licensing and bingo tax administration
notes: Statutory bingo licensing belongs to the Dept of Revenue Bingo Section (distinct from the Arizona Dept of Gaming). azdor.gov returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch (bot protection); content verified via browser user-agent. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Finance & Revenue Department - Miscellaneous Tax Section
body_name: Arkansas Department of Finance and Administration
verticals_covered: Charitable bingo & raffle licensing and taxation
notes: Charitable bingo/raffle administered by DF&A Excise Tax Administration, Miscellaneous Tax Section. Phone/address appeared only in third-party search snippets, not on the official program page, so left blank per sourcing rules. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Department of Agriculture & Consumer Services - Game Promotions/Sweepstakes
body_name: Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services
verticals_covered: Registration of game promotions (sweepstakes/contests) under FS 849.094
notes: FDACS registers game promotions/sweepstakes under FS 849.094 (not bingo; charitable bingo in FL is largely local). General contact via https://contact.fdacs.gov/. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Lottery - Charitable Gaming (Enforcement Division)
body_name: Idaho State Lottery Commission
verticals_covered: Charitable bingo and raffle licensing
address: Idaho Lottery Enforcement Division, PO Box 6537, Boise, ID 83707
notes: Idaho Lottery administers charitable gaming. Bingo license required for >$10,000/yr; raffle license for >$5,000 in prize value. Named contact is the program coordinator (Tina Miller), not the agency head. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Tax Division - Bingo & Raffle Registration
body_name: West Virginia State Tax Department
verticals_covered: Charitable bingo & raffle licensing
notes: Only tax-exempt charitable/public-service orgs may be licensed by the Tax Commissioner to conduct bingo/raffles. Agency now styled "West Virginia Tax Division" on its site (legacy name: State Tax Department). Alt phone (800) 982-8297. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Comptroller - tax/registration (charitable gaming is county-level)
body_name: County-level authorization; Comptroller registration
verticals_covered: No statewide charitable gaming license; counties license bingo/raffles/games of chance; Comptroller handles Admissions & Amusement tax and nonprofit (SUTEC) registration
address: Comptroller of Maryland, Revenue Administration Division, PO Box 549, Annapolis, MD 21404-0549
notes: No statewide MD charitable gaming license — individual counties license bingo/raffles/games of chance. The Comptroller's role is tax administration (Admissions & Amusement tax on bingo/tip jars) and nonprofit (SUTEC) registration, not gaming licensing. A&A page 301-redirects to the Comptroller services knowledge base (HTTP 200). Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State regulatory commission (within Division of Consumer Affairs)
body_name: New Jersey Legalized Games of Chance Control Commission
verticals_covered: Charitable/legalized games of chance — bingo, raffles, amusement games
leadership_title: Acting Director, Division of Consumer Affairs
notes: Oversees charitable gaming for ~7,000 registered organizations and ~700 amusement game licensees statewide. Leadership listed is the parent Division Acting Director (no commission-specific director named on page). Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Regulatory unit (within Division of Consumer Affairs)
body_name: Division of Consumer Affairs - Fantasy Sports Unit
verticals_covered: Fantasy sports activities (DFS) — operator permitting and monitoring
leadership_title: Acting Director, Division of Consumer Affairs
notes: Regulates fantasy sports activities in NJ — reviews applications, issues annual permits, and monitors operators. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State racing commission (within Office of the Attorney General)
body_name: New Jersey Racing Commission
verticals_covered: Horse racing and pari-mutuel wagering
notes: Canonical path is /nj-racing-commission/ (older nj.gov/oag/racing path did not resolve). Contact details not shown on the landing page. Acting Executive Director Sara Ben-David appointed July 24, 2024. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State gaming enforcement/regulatory agency (within Office of the Attorney General)
body_name: New Jersey Division of Gaming Enforcement
verticals_covered: Casino gaming; internet/online casino gaming; sports wagering (casinos & racetracks)
notes: Investigative arm of the casino regulatory system; enforces the Casino Control Act and tests casino/internet gaming platforms. Jurisdiction expanded to online casino (2013) and sports wagering (2018). Trenton office: 140 East Front Street, PO Box 047, Trenton, NJ 08625. Older nj.gov/oag/ge path now redirects. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Law enforcement division (within Department of Public Safety)
body_name: North Carolina Department of Public Safety - ALE
verticals_covered: Charitable gaming enforcement — bingo licensing/enforcement and game night applications
notes: ALE (Alcohol Law Enforcement) hosts charitable bingo licensing/enforcement on ncdps.gov; standalone ale.nc.gov did not resolve. Bingo licensing mailing address: 4233 Mail Service Center, Raleigh, NC 27699. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State lottery commission (designated gaming regulator)
body_name: North Carolina State Lottery Commission
verticals_covered: Lottery; sports wagering (licensing/regulation); pari-mutuel/horse race wagering (authorized by statute; rulemaking in progress)
notes: NC State Lottery Commission is the state's designated gaming regulator. Two official surfaces: ncgaming.gov (gaming-regulator site for sports wagering & pari-mutuel) and nclottery.com (lottery operations + commission roster). Executive Director Mark Michalko. Pari-mutuel/horse-race wagering authorized by 2023 law, under rulemaking, not yet operational. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State racing commission
body_name: Indiana Horse Racing Commission
verticals_covered: Horse racing (standardbred, thoroughbred, quarter horse), pari-mutuel wagering, participant licensing
notes: The Horse Racing Commission, distinct from the Indiana Gaming Commission. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Independent de jure municipal corporation / political subdivision
body_name: Kentucky Horse Racing and Gaming Corporation
verticals_covered: Horse racing, pari-mutuel wagering, historical horse racing, sports wagering, charitable gaming
notes: Current entity (formerly Kentucky Horse Racing Commission); regulates horse racing AND sports wagering. The candidate domain khrgc.ky.gov did NOT resolve — the agency retained the legacy khrc.ky.gov domain after the merger/rebrand. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State lottery and gaming control agency/commission
body_name: Maryland Lottery and Gaming Control Commission
verticals_covered: Commercial casinos, sports wagering, lottery, fantasy competitions, skills-based amusement devices, commercial instant bingo
notes: Official regulatory site (mdgaming.com), distinct from the consumer lottery site mdlottery.com. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Independent statutory licensing commission (housed alongside MLGCA)
body_name: Sports Wagering Application Review Commission
verticals_covered: Sports wagering license awards (Class A/B facility + mobile licenses)
notes: SWARC (7 members) awards Maryland sports wagering licenses; created by HB 940 (2021). Cannot award a license to anyone not first found qualified by the MLGCA. Standalone official site swarc.org (a Maryland.gov resource; @mga.maryland.gov email). Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State commission (statutorily established; currently dormant)
body_name: Missouri Horse Racing Commission
verticals_covered: Horse racing / pari-mutuel wagering (none active)
notes: INACTIVE/dormant — no standalone official site located 2026-05-23. Established under the Missouri Constitution (Amendment 7, 1984) and still listed in the state boards directory (boards.mo.gov), but MO has no active racetracks or pari-mutuel operations (only licensed racing ran 1986-1988). Distinct from the active Missouri Gaming Commission. Website left blank per sourcing rules.

body_type: State lottery agency (runs/regulates sports betting)
body_name: Oregon State Lottery
verticals_covered: Lottery + sports betting
notes: Oregon Lottery runs/regulates sports betting (DraftKings, formerly the Scoreboard app). Commission Chair Marty Ramirez. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Division within Department of Business Regulation
body_name: Rhode Island Division of Gaming and Athletics Licensing
verticals_covered: Pari-mutuel/simulcast wagering, racing taxes/fees, athletics licensing (boxing, MMA)
notes: Within the RI Department of Business Regulation (DBR). Official 2026 license-application forms use the full name "Division of Gaming and Athletics Licensing"; the current landing-page heading reads "Gaming and Athletics." Candidate /divisions path 404s. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Territorial Attorney General / Department of Legal Affairs
body_name: American Samoa Attorney General; local authorization
verticals_covered: General law enforcement & consumer protection; commercial gambling generally prohibited; charitable gaming locally authorized
address: PO Box 7, Pago Pago, American Samoa 96799
notes: Official .as.gov site for the Dept of Legal Affairs / AG. No standalone gaming-program page; charitable gaming is locally authorized (AS Code §46.4602 prohibits commercial gambling). Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Attorney General's office - Gaming Division
body_name: North Dakota Office of Attorney General - Gaming Division
verticals_covered: Charitable gaming (regulation, enforcement, audits, licensing/training)
address: 600 E. Boulevard Ave., Dept. 125, Bismarck, ND 58505
notes: The Gaming Division regulates, enforces, and administers charitable gaming in North Dakota. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State racing commission
body_name: North Dakota Racing Commission
verticals_covered: Live and simulcast horse racing; pari-mutuel wagering
notes: Standalone 5-member commission on a .nd.gov subdomain. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Consolidated territorial gaming commission (Law 81-2019)
body_name: Puerto Rico Gaming Commission (Comision de Juegos)
verticals_covered: Games of chance/casinos, horse racing (Negociado del Deporte Hipico), sports betting, route/slot machines
address: 159 Calle Chardon, Piso 2, San Juan, PR 00918
notes: Horse racing is consolidated under the Comision de Juegos (its Negociado del Deporte Hipico) — no separate active hipico body. The candidate juegodepr.com did NOT resolve; the official URL confirmed via the pr.gov agency directory is comjuegos.pr.gov. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Attorney General's office (Consumer Assistance)
body_name: Vermont Attorney General
verticals_covered: Fantasy sports contests — rulemaking and civil enforcement authority
notes: VT AG holds rulemaking/civil-enforcement authority over fantasy sports contests per 31 V.S.A. ch. 25 §1334; DFS operator registration is filed with the Dept of Liquor & Lottery. ago.vermont.gov returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch (bot protection); confirmed official via search + statute. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: Territorial commission (within Department of Sports, Parks and Recreation)
body_name: Virgin Islands Racing Commission
verticals_covered: Horse racing
notes: Two island commissions (STT/STJ and STX) within the VI Dept of Sports, Parks and Recreation (DSPR). STX office: William D. Roebuck Industrial Park, Frederiksted 00840. No phone/email published on the page. Verified 2026-05-23.

body_type: State Department of Agriculture & Consumer Services - Office of Charitable and Regulatory Programs
body_name: Virginia Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services
verticals_covered: Fantasy contests (Fantasy Contests Act); charitable gaming
notes: VDACS Office of Charitable and Regulatory Programs (OCRP) administers Virginia's Fantasy Contests Act. 804-371-0498 is the OCRP complaint line. Verified 2026-05-23.
